message:
程序默认开启自动共享标签,你需要共享三个以上标签才能在线下载别人的共享的标签
也有离线标签包,离线标签数据在QQ群中自取,同时有FUID和CUID标签卡出售(可点击咸鱼图标快速跳转,发送APP过来的有赠品)
QQ群号:1074926713
程序开源！软件本体不涉及任何收费行为!!!
软件功能和标签不保证长期可用性!!!

FUID(推荐):
官卡和FUID的0区块是一次性的，写入后无法更改！
官方卡不能改写成其他标签!
官方卡不能改写成其他标签!
官方卡不能改写成其他标签
但是其他区块可更改
除非你明确将卡作为其他用途及用法
否则不建议格式化官卡和FUID
格式化后可以使用对应UID的标签数据写入还原
CUID:
CUID是可重复擦写的
但CUID卡市面上绝大多数是无法使用的
不建议不懂卡的人在其他渠道购买
messageEn:
[This information may not be applicable to users outside of China.]
 Tag data is available in the github. FUID and CUID tags are also for sale (tap the Xianyu icon to jump there; orders placed via the app include a free gift).
QQ Group: 1074926713
Open source! The software itself is completely free!!!
Long-term availability of features and tags is not guaranteed!!!

Recent AMS firmware may cause tag data to become invalid. If this happens, scan the card and report the anomaly — the tag will be flagged and a warning will appear when copying!!!

FUID (Recommended):
Sector 0 of official and FUID cards is one-time-write and cannot be changed once written.
Other sectors can be modified.
Formatting official or FUID cards is not recommended unless you clearly intend to repurpose the card.
After formatting, you can restore it by writing the tag data for the same UID.
CUID:
CUID cards can be erased and rewritten.
However, the vast majority of CUID cards on the market are not usable.
Buying from other channels is not recommended if you are unfamiliar with NFC card types.
adMessage:
咸鱼图标可以跳转买卡店铺(发送APP过来的有赠品),店铺也有一些3D打印周边物品可按需购买

makeroad(一个3D打印模型网站)拉用户得积分
复制下面连接打开后注册就行!
https://www.makeroad.com/login?inviteCode=438574
你注册后上传模型也能白嫖耗材!

一个好用的耗材管理微信小程序[WM万墨]
广告位招租^-^
adMessageEn:
[This information may not be applicable to users outside of China.]
The Xianyu icon links to the tag shop (orders placed via the app include a free gift). The shop also carries various 3D printing accessories.

Advertising space available ^-^
